title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open-source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code bases as an alternative to RAG systems. It addresses memory limitations in Claude Code by enabling more accurate, token-efficient responses through structured code analysis.
